title: Class Notes Challenge
subtitle: Organize messy notes

instructions.title: Messy Notes Cleanup
instructions.text: A student took messy notes in class. Clean them up!
instructions.audio: Make these notes clear and organized
tips: Make it easy to study from

messyNotes: photosynthesis plants use sunlight and water and CO2 to make food and oxygen happens in leaves important chlorophyll is green water cycle has evaporation when water turns to vapor then condensation makes clouds then precipitation is rain or snow runoff goes back to ocean
sampleGoodNotes:
**Photosynthesis:**
• Plants make food
• sunlight + water + CO2 → food + O2
• Happens in leaves
• Chlorophyll = green

**Water Cycle:**
1. Evaporation (water → vapor)
2. Condensation (vapor → clouds)
3. Precipitation (rain/snow)
4. Runoff (→ ocean)

perfect.message: Perfect organization! Notes are super clear! 🏆
perfect.audio: These notes would definitely help you ace the test

good.message: Good work! Notes are much better! 👍
